params.users: Array of addresses to claim for. Max 1000 per call.

returns.claimed: Number of addresses that successfully received UBI.

params.user: The verified human to claim for.

params._feeSplitter: New feeSplitter address. Must not be address(0).

params.authorized: True to authorize, false to revoke.

params.enabled: True to allow self-claims; false for relayer-only mode.

params.newAdmin: New admin address. Must not be address(0).

batchClaim(address[]).notice: Batch claim UBI for multiple users in a single transaction.         Gas paid by the relayer. Silently skips addresses that are         not verified or have already claimed this epoch, so the batch         never reverts due to one ineligible address.

canClaim(address).notice: Whether an address can claim in the current epoch.

claim().notice: Self-claim UBI for the caller. Caller pays gas.         Reverts if self-claiming is disabled (relayer-only mode).

claimFor(address).notice: Relay a claim on behalf of a single user. Gas paid by relayer.

lastClaimEpoch(address).notice: Last epoch in which each address claimed UBI.         epoch = block.timestamp / EPOCH_DURATION

selfClaimEnabled().notice: Whether individual self-claiming (user pays gas) is enabled.

setFeeSplitter(address).notice: Update the UBIFeeSplitter contract used for pool supplementation.

setRelayer(address,bool).notice: Authorize or revoke a trusted relayer.

setSelfClaimEnabled(bool).notice: Enable or disable direct self-claiming (user-pays-gas mode).

supplementPool().notice: Pull accrued G$ fees from the feeSplitter into the GoodDollar UBI pool.         Anyone can call this — it only moves funds that feeSplitter already holds.         No-op if feeSplitter is not set or has no claimable balance.

transferAdmin(address).notice: Transfer admin authority (single-step). Takes effect immediately.

trustedRelayers(address).notice: Addresses authorized to relay gas-free claims on behalf of users.

documentation.text: @notice Transfer `amount` G$ from feeSplitter to recipient (UBI funding).
@notice Addresses authorized to relay gas-free claims on behalf of users.

@notice Last epoch in which each address claimed UBI.
         epoch = block.timestamp / EPOCH_DURATION
@notice Whether individual self-claiming (user pays gas) is enabled.
@notice Whether an address can claim in the current epoch.

@notice Self-claim UBI for the caller. Caller pays gas.
         Reverts if self-claiming is disabled (relayer-only mode).

@notice Relay a claim on behalf of a single user. Gas paid by relayer.
 @param user The verified human to claim for.

@notice Enable or disable direct self-claiming (user-pays-gas mode).
 @param enabled True to allow self-claims; false for relayer-only mode.

@notice Update the UBIFeeSplitter contract used for pool supplementation.
 @param _feeSplitter New feeSplitter address. Must not be address(0).

@notice Transfer admin authority (single-step). Takes effect immediately.
 @param newAdmin New admin address. Must not be address(0).
